creator: beat@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Pav,

On 04.08.2010 15:03, pav@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> The patch no longer applies cleanly, most notably moonshine was updated to 0.7
> independently. Could you regenerate a fresh patch for me?

I've run a test build on my tinderbox and the new moonshine version in
ports builds fine with libxul 1.9.2.8 so only a PORTREVISION bump is
needed. You will find an updated patch attached.

Thanks,
Beat
